sentence_reviews.text: Continual and test-time adaptation update a model, memory, statistics, or prompts as distributions and tasks change after the initial training run.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent arXiv abstract lines 38-39 says a model adapts itself to new and different data during testing, estimates normalization statistics, and optimizes affine transformations online on each batch; Snell arXiv abstract lines 42-45 discusses inference-time compute and adaptively updating the model's response distribution at test time.
sentence_reviews.notes: Model/statistics/test-time response adaptation is supported; memory and prompts are broader than the inspected sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tent arXiv abstract line 38 describes updating online on each batch during fully test-time adaptation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for online test-time adaptation.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Continual & online learning, In-context & test-time learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
